results.title: Anutin seeks Chinese AI ties
results.description: Thailand is seeking new economic opportunities through closer cooperation with China, with a focus on artificial intelligence (AI), semiconductors, clean energy and other future industries.

results.title: WATCH: Charter bus catches fire on I-35 near Des Moines metro
results.description: A charter bus fire on I-35 South between Cumming and Bevington caused traffic delays, but no injuries were reported.

results.title: Trump team scrutinized election agency over 2020 vote before firing its leaders
results.description: WASHINGTON, July 17 (Reuters) - President Donald Trump's administration ⁠spent more than a year scrutinizing the federal agency that oversees U.S. voting systems, questioning its handling of the 2020 presidential election and vetting potential new leaders before he fired its commissioners ⁠last week, according to documents reviewed by Reuters and two people familiar with the discussions.

results.title: Chevron seeks new route to transport oil from Iraq
results.description: As the U.S. war with Iran is rekindled, oil producers are looking for new routes to bypass the Strait of Hormuz.

results.title: Londonderry officials face harassment, misconduct allegations amid rising legal costs
results.description: Several top officials in Londonderry have faced serious allegations ranging from procedural town charter violations to sexual harassment, documents show.

results.title: Man arrested on charges of negligent homicide, DWI in crash that killed Marked Tree police officer
results.description: A man involved in a June crash that killed a a Marked Tree police officer was arrested Friday on charges negligent homicide and driving while intoxicated, police said.

results.title: Judge rules against Trump’s firing of FEMA CFO
results.description: Comans sued the Trump administration in March 2025, arguing that she was “unlawfully terminated” from her role without due process or the opportunity to “appropriately respond” to her termination. On Friday, U.S. District Judge Michael S. Nachmanoff, an appointee of former President Joe Biden, sided with Comans. results.title: Morgantown twins battle heart condition, 1 in need of transplant
results.description: MORGANTOWN, Ky.- A set of Morgantown twins were diagnosed with dilatated cardiomyopathy. One twin has received a heart transplant, while the other still awaits. The family said it is grateful to the parents who made the decision that allowed one daughter a second chance at life. “That’s part of their child that’s walking around in my child that lets her...

results.title: Quebec finance minister says economy is doing better than expected
results.description: MONTREAL — Quebec Finance Minister Eric Girard says the province’s economy is faring better than expected despite global uncertainty. He says Quebec’s deficit for the last fiscal year, which ended in March, showed an operational deficit of $5.

results.title: A 7.3 earthquake hits Mexico-Guatemala border with no immediate damage reported
results.description: TAPACHULA, México (AP) — A strong earthquake struck the southern Mexican Pacific coast on Friday, right on the border with Guatemala, and was felt from Mexico City to El Salvador. Authorities did not report any severe damage or casualties in any country. Two people were reported injured in southern Mexico.

results.description: NFL suspends Arizona Cardinals executive indefinitely for violating league’s gambling policy
